convexUrl.label: Convex Deployment URL
convexUrl.help: Your Convex deployment URL (the one from npx convex dev)

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically search and inject relevant memories before each agent response

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically extract and store important facts after each agent turn

recallLimit.label: Recall Limit
recallLimit.help: Maximum number of memory facts to inject (default: 5)

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum user message length eligible for auto-capture (default: 500)

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: Fact extraction method: 'regex' (free, basic), 'llm' (Ollama local, smarter), 'both' (regex + LLM). Default: 'regex'

llmUrl.label: LLM URL (Ollama)
llmUrl.help: Ollama API URL for LLM-based capture (default: http://localhost:11434)

llmModel.label: LLM Model
llmModel.help: Model name for fact extraction (default: gpt-5.4-nano). Must support JSON output.

llmApiKey.label: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.help: API key for OpenAI-compatible LLM. Falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY env var.

bootAudit.label: Boot Audit
bootAudit.help: Run coherence audit on first message of each session (default: false)

syncMdEnabled.label: Sync .md Files
syncMdEnabled.help: Auto-sync facts to workspace .md files by category (default: false)
